[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011011 5
1 1100011 4
2 1111111 a
3 1001000 2
4 0001111 4
5 0101001 3
6 0001011 3
7 0000000 a

01 0000000 a match 7

23 1000000 1

67 0000000 a match 7
